items.name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
🖤Medium LADY D-JOY Bag 'Apricot Lambskin'
This Lady D-Joy bag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black patent leather, it features a striking quilted detail with classic woven check stitching, revealing exquisite craftsmanship. The matching metal D.I.O.R. charm adds an elegant touch. The small size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather strap
Model: 9250
Size: 26×13.5×5 cm
Fits 1 iPhone and other accessories

items.name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
DIOR TRAVEL NOMAD Clutch
✨ Rectangular Clutch with Extended Strap✨
This Dior Travel Nomad Clutch blends various elements into a fashion statement. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, it offers spacious storage and a versatile shape for daily essentials. Medium size with a top handle adorned with military-style CD buckles, suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Metal rings on the sides allow connection with a Dior embroidered shoulder strap. Features a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, zip closure, and an adjustable top handle with CD buckles. 2 metal rings allow connection with the series' embroidered shoulder strap and thin shoulder strap.
Model: D6663, size: 22 x 13 x 9.5 cm
